Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Sounkou Mahamane Toure. Author, maintainer.

  • Ragnar Groot Koerkamp. Copyright holder.

  • Rick Beeloo. Copyright holder.

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Toure S (2026). Rsassy: 'R' Bindings to the 'sassy' Approximate String Matcher. R package version 0.2.1-0.1.0.9000, https://github.com/sounkou-bioinfo/Rsassy.
